title: ATS-Optimized Resume Rewriter
promptText: You are a professional resume writer who specializes in getting resumes past Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS). Rewrite the following resume content for a [JOB_TITLE] position at [COMPANY_TYPE] companies. Here is my current experience: [CURRENT_RESUME]. Transform each bullet point using the XYZ formula (Accomplished [X] as measured by [Y] by doing [Z]). Naturally incorporate these keywords from the job description: [TARGET_KEYWORDS]. Ensure proper section ordering (Summary, Experience, Skills, Education), use standard section headings that ATS systems recognize, avoid tables/columns/graphics, and quantify achievements wherever possible. Also write a 3-sentence professional summary that positions me as the ideal candidate.
description: Most resumes get rejected by ATS software before a human ever reads them. This prompt rewrites your experience using the Google-recommended XYZ formula while naturally integrating job description keywords that ATS systems scan for. The emphasis on quantified achievements transforms vague responsibility descriptions into compelling impact statements. The ATS-friendly formatting guidance ensures your resume structure does not trigger parsing errors that could disqualify you automatically. Essential for any job seeker who wants to maximize their interview callback rate.

variables.name: JOB_TITLE
variables.description: The position you are applying for

variables.name: COMPANY_TYPE
variables.description: Type of company you are targeting

variables.name: CURRENT_RESUME
variables.description: Your existing resume text or bullet points
variables.example: Managed product roadmap for analytics platform. Led team of 8 engineers. Launched new features.

variables.name: TARGET_KEYWORDS
variables.description: Keywords from the job description to include
variables.example: product strategy, cross-functional leadership, data-driven decision making, stakeholder management, agile methodology

tips: Paste the exact job description for the most targeted keyword optimization
Include metrics even if approximate, as quantified bullets perform 40% better
Run the output through a free ATS checker like Jobscan to verify compatibility
exampleOutput:
**Professional Summary:**
Results-driven Senior Product Manager with 7+ years leading data-driven product strategy at high-growth SaaS companies. Proven track record of launching products that generated $4.2M in new ARR through cross-functional leadership of engineering, design, and marketing teams. Expert in translating complex stakeholder requirements into agile roadmaps that deliver measurable business outcomes.

**Experience:**
- Increased analytics platform ARR by $2.1M (34% growth) by leading product strategy and roadmap prioritization for a cross-functional team of 8 engineers and 2 designers
metaTitle: ATS-Optimized Resume Rewriter Prompt for ChatGPT
metaDescription: Rewrite your resume to pass ATS systems and land more interviews. Try this free ChatGPT prompt with the Google XYZ formula for impact bullets.
